case_title: OPTIO SOLUTIONS LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY C VS. CUONG M NGUYEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION MAY-23-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG M. NGUYEN, A/K/A KEVIN NGUYEN, WHO FAILED TO APPEAR FOR THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE WITH BAIL SET AT $500.00. D. LILAH MCLEAN, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF OPTIO SOLUTIONS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CUONG M. NGUYEN, A/K/A KEVIN NGUYEN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON DEFENDANT CUONG M. NGUYEN, A/K/A KEVIN NGUYEN, ON 3/25/19. BENCH LETTER ISSUED 4/16/19. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPTIO SOLUTIONS LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY C DBA QUALIA COLLECTION SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, CUONG M ALSO KNOWN AS KEVIN NGUYEN AN INDIVIDUAL $5,959.95 PRINCIPAL, $3,217.54 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,222.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
